# Write-CanonFiles.ps1 — Creates UIAO_135 and UIAO_136 in canon directory
# Run from: C:\Users\whale\git\uiao\tools\
# Usage:    .\Write-CanonFiles.ps1

$ErrorActionPreference = "Stop"
$canon = "C:\Users\whale\git\uiao\src\uiao\canon"

if (-not (Test-Path $canon)) {
    Write-Error "Canon directory not found: $canon"
    return
}

# --- UIAO_135 (base64-encoded, UTF-8 no BOM, LF line endings) ---
$b64_135 = ""

# --- UIAO_136 (base64-encoded, UTF-8 no BOM, LF line endings) ---
$b64_136 = ""

$file135 = Join-Path $canon "UIAO_135_identity-directory-transformation-inventory.md"
$file136 = Join-Path $canon "UIAO_136_priority1-transformation-project-plans.md"

Write-Host "Writing UIAO_135..." -ForegroundColor Yellow
[System.IO.File]::WriteAllBytes($file135, [System.Convert]::FromBase64String($b64_135))
Write-Host "  OK  $file135" -ForegroundColor Green

Write-Host "Writing UIAO_136..." -ForegroundColor Yellow
[System.IO.File]::WriteAllBytes($file136, [System.Convert]::FromBase64String($b64_136))
Write-Host "  OK  $file136" -ForegroundColor Green

Write-Host ""
Write-Host "Both files written. Now run:" -ForegroundColor Cyan
Write-Host "  cd C:\Users\whale\git\uiao" -ForegroundColor White
Write-Host "  git add src/uiao/canon/UIAO_135_identity-directory-transformation-inventory.md" -ForegroundColor White
Write-Host "  git add src/uiao/canon/UIAO_136_priority1-transformation-project-plans.md" -ForegroundColor White
Write-Host '  git commit -m "feat(canon): add identity transformation inventory and project plans' -ForegroundColor White
Write-Host ""
Write-Host '    - UIAO_135: Identity and Directory Transformation Inventory (17 transformations, 4 domains)' -ForegroundColor White
Write-Host '    - UIAO_136: Priority 1 Project Plans (3 specs, 100 deliverables)' -ForegroundColor White
Write-Host '      Spec 1: Computer Object Transformation' -ForegroundColor White
Write-Host '      Spec 2: HR-Agnostic Provisioning Architecture' -ForegroundColor White
Write-Host '      Spec 3: Service Account to Workload Identity Mapping' -ForegroundColor White
Write-Host ""
Write-Host '    Ref: ADR-001 through ADR-004"' -ForegroundColor White
Write-Host "  git push origin main" -ForegroundColor White
